title: Supply Chain Manager - Rhenus Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Rhenus Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
